templateOptions.description: Turso database URL (libsql:// or https:// format)
templateOptions.label: Database URL

templateOptions.description: Turso database authentication token (JWT from Turso dashboard)
templateOptions.label: Auth Token

templateOptions.description: Filter data by source system (leave empty to import all sources)
templateOptions.label: Source System Filter

templateOptions.description: Include contracts with end dates in the past (expired contracts)
templateOptions.label: Include Inactive Contracts

templateOptions.description: Comma-separated fields to exclude from output (supports wildcards like custom_*, Contact.Personal.*)
templateOptions.label: Fields to Exclude

templateOptions.description: Enable verbose logging for troubleshooting (shows SQL queries and data counts)
templateOptions.label: Debug Mode
